/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsc-utils.so -o /home/jun-k01/ndtp/nika/problem-solver/sc-machine/bin/extensions/libsc-utils.so "CMakeFiles/sc-utils.dir/utils.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sc-utils.dir/utils_erase_elements.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sc-utils.dir/utils_keynodes.c.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jun-k01/ndtp/nika/problem-solver/sc-machine/bin/extensions:/home/jun-k01/ndtp/nika/problem-solver/sc-machine/bin /home/jun-k01/ndtp/nika/problem-solver/sc-machine/bin/extensions/libsc-search.so /home/jun-k01/ndtp/nika/problem-solver/sc-machine/bin/libsc-kpm-common.so /home/jun-k01/ndtp/nika/problem-solver/sc-machine/bin/libsc-core.so -Wl,--export-dynamic -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu -lgmodule-2.0 -pthread -lglib-2.0
